jobs.title: Account Executive - Melbourne
jobs.content: <p>Our mission is to empower the global restaurant community to delight their guests, do what they love, and thrive.&nbsp;</p><p>To help achieve this mission, Toast is expanding into new countries and markets and so we are currently seeking <strong>an Account Executive<em> </em></strong>to serve as a founding member of our Australian team.&nbsp;As one of the first Account Executives in Australia, you will help define the playbook for selling Toast POS, Toast Online Ordering, Toast Mobile Order &amp; Pay, Toast Payroll, Toast Capital, and Toast Catering &amp; Events to restaurants across Melbourne and the wider Victoria region. You'll partner closely with the Sales Acceleration team in Boston and the International Horizon 2 leadership in Sydney to land Toast's first wave of Australian restaurant customers.</p>

jobs.title: Bilingual Business Development Representative (Mandarin)
jobs.content: <p>Toast creates technology to help restaurants and local businesses succeed in a digital world, helping business owners operate, increase sales, engage customers, and keep employees happy.</p><p>As a Bilingual Business Development Representative (BDR) you will be responsible for creating new business sales opportunities, primarily in Mandarin, for Toast's Strategic Cuisines vertical. You'll work closely with the Strategic Cuisines AE team to qualify inbound interest from Chinese, Taiwanese, and Hong Kong restaurant owners across the United States, and you'll build outbound prospecting motions targeting Mandarin-speaking restaurant operators in PST-timezone markets including Greater Los Angeles, the San Francisco Bay Area, Seattle, and Portland.&nbsp;Toast Pickup &amp; Delivery and Toast Online Ordering are the flagship products you'll be positioning into the Strategic Cuisines pipeline.</p>
